steps.title: Match the conclusion
steps.content: The conclusion says paywalls generally benefit larger newspapers more. Supporting data must compare a larger paper with a smaller one and show the larger paper had the better revenue change.

steps.title: Use the large-small contrast
steps.content: A and B compare two large papers, so they do not test the size contrast. D gives only the smaller paper's weak result. The useful comparison pairs a large paper's 20% gain with a smaller paper's -1% change. The answer is C.
